title: sort() to find min or max
message: This is slow because array.sort()[0] sorts the whole list just to grab the smallest or largest, so use Math.min(...array) instead
help: Use `Math.min(...array)` or `Math.max(...array)` instead of sorting the whole list just to read the first or last item
